phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a table if one opens up
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde esperamos si se libera una mesa?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh es-peh-RAH-mohs see seh lee-BEH-rah oo-nah MEH-sah?

likely_response.local: Junto al mostrador de jamón, por favor.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH hah-MÓN POHR fah-BOHR
likely_response.translation_en: Wait near the bar, on the right.

responses.english: Wait near the bar, on the right.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH hah-MÓN POHR fah-BOHR
responses.french: Junto al mostrador de jamón, por favor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to order tapas at the bar
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo pedimos las tapas en la barra?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-mo peh-DEE-mos las TA-pas en la BA-rrah?

likely_response.local: Pida directamente al camarero y pague al final.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEE-dah dee-rehth-tah-MEHN-teh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh Y pah-G-eh AHL fee-NAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Order directly from the bartender and pay at the end.

responses.english: Order directly from the bartender and pay at the end.
responses.phonetic: PEE-dah dee-rehth-tah-MEHN-teh AHL kah-mah-REH-roh Y pah-G-eh AHL fee-NAHL
responses.french: Pida directamente al camarero y pague al final.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Albariño selection is kept
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la selección de Albariño?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-des eh-STAH lah seh-lek-see-OHN deh ahl-bah-REE-nyoh?

likely_response.local: En la vitrina refrigerada, al fondo izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH beet-REE-nah rehf-ree-heh-RAH-dah AHL FOHN-doh eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the refrigerated display, at the back left.

responses.english: In the refrigerated display, at the back left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH beet-REE-nah rehf-ree-heh-RAH-dah AHL FOHN-doh eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En la vitrina refrigerada, al fondo izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay at the bar
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se paga la cuenta aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh seh PAH-gah lah KWEN-tah ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: En la caja, al fondo a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH KAH-hah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the cashier, at the back on the right.

responses.english: At the cashier, at the back on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH KAH-hah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En la caja, al fondo a la derecha.
